india_trends.title: Bank of Maharashtra shares jump 13% in three sessions! Time to buy after Q4 results?
india_trends.summary: Shares of Bank of Maharashtra surged up to 6% after reporting a strong Q4 FY26, with net profit rising 35% YoY to Rs 2,014 crore. Growth was driven by an 18.8% jump in net interest income and a 13% increase in overall revenues, reflecting robust operational performance.

india_trends.title: India's economy projected to grow at 6.4% this year: UN
india_trends.summary: India’s economy is projected to grow 6.4% in 2026 and 6.6% in 2027, according to a United Nations Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific report, after expanding 7.4% in 2025 on strong consumption and tax cuts.

india_trends.title: India fertiliser output drops a quarter on Mideast war
india_trends.summary: India's fertiliser production plunged nearly a quarter in March, official data showed, after natural gas imports used in its manufacture were hit by the Middle East conflict. Natural gas is used to power the production of urea, a key part of the lifeline fertilisers used by India's vast agriculture
